title: Markdown document editor with real-time collaboration and preview
purpose: Provides a rich text editing experience for markdown documents with real-time collaboration, preview synchronization, and status tracking features.
module_context: Initializes CodeMirror editor with custom markdown support, sets up WebSocket connections for real-time updates, handles document loading and saving, manages preview rendering with custom processing, and implements UI controls for editing, commenting, and status management.

steps.content: Look up the editor content if available.
Split content into lines for searching.
Clean the search text for matching by removing markdown formatting artifacts.
Search for the text in each line using case-insensitive partial matching.
IF a match is found in a line, return the line number.
ELSE search in the entire content as a whole for a match.
IF a match is found in the content, count newlines before the match position and return the line number.
IF no match is found, return -1.
Check if editor view is available and line number is valid.
Get the document from the editor view.
IF line number exceeds document lines, return early.
Get the line from the document using the line number.
Set the cursor to the start of the line and scroll into view.
Focus the editor view.
Request animation frame to flash highlight the active line.
After flash duration, remove the flash highlight class.
Initialize an empty text string.
Iterate through all child nodes of the element.
IF node is a text node, append its text content to the result.
IF node is an element node, include its text content if it's not a block element.
Return the trimmed text content.
Add a click event listener to the preview element.
For each click, find the closest block-level element.
IF a block element is found, get its direct text content.
Find the line number in the editor for the text content.
IF a valid line number is found, jump to that line in the editor.
Create a new CodeMirror editor view with the initial content.
Configure the editor with custom setup extensions.
Add markdown language support to the editor.
Apply the current editor theme.
Set up update listener to schedule saves and auto-refreshes on document changes.
Get the current editor content.
Destroy the existing editor view.
Recreate the editor view with the same content.
Apply the updated theme to the new editor view.
Fetch document content from the API.
Set the editor content to the fetched document.
Render the preview for the document.
Check if diff mode is active.
IF diff mode is active, render the preview with diff.
ELSE render the preview normally.
Check if diff mode is active.
IF diff mode is active, render the preview with diff.
ELSE render the preview normally.
Get the CodeMirror scroll element.
Add scroll event listener to the CodeMirror scroller.
On scroll, calculate scroll percentage and synchronize preview scroll.
Add scroll event listener to the preview scroll element.
On scroll, calculate scroll percentage and synchronize editor scroll.
Update minimap viewport indicator on preview scroll.
Add click event listener to the minimap track.
On track click, calculate scroll position and jump to that position.
Add click event listener to minimap markers.
On marker click, scroll to the associated element.
Add resize event listener to update minimap on window resize.
Add mousedown event listener to the resizer element.
On mousedown, set resizing flag and update cursor style.
Add mousemove event listener to resize the editor pane.
On mousemove, calculate new pane width and update flex property.
Add mouseup event listener to stop resizing and save position.

methods.name: computeLocalDiff
methods.normalized_params: (oldContent: string, newContent: string): { oldString: string; newString: string } | null

steps.content: Compare old and new content for differences.
IF content is identical, return null.
ELSE extract differing portions and return as patch object.
Show the diff toggle button.
Render the preview with diff.
Hide the diff toggle button.
Reset the last patch information.
Render the preview normally.
Check if editor view is available.
IF editor view is not available, disable undo and redo buttons.
ELSE enable undo and redo buttons.

methods.normalized_params: (text: string, cursorPos: number): { lineStart: number; lineEnd: number; lineContent: string }

steps.content: Get the text before the cursor position.
Find the start of the current line.
Get the text after the cursor position.
Find the end of the current line.
Extract the content of the current line.
Return line start, end, and content.

methods.name: parseListItem
methods.normalized_params: (line: string): { marker: string; content: string } | null

steps.content: Match bullet list items with markers.
IF bullet list match is found, return marker and content.
ELSE match numbered list items with markers.
IF numbered list match is found, return marker and content.
ELSE return null.
Get the text before the cursor position.
Find the nearest heading position.
Return the position of the nearest heading.
Escape special regex characters in the string.
Return the escaped string.

steps.content: Split the content at the specified position.
Concatenate the first part, new text, and second part.
